violations.text: Hot-hold unit door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of black residue. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The mixer bowl was observed with several dents. Bowl to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of the PIC, previously prepped/sliced tomato was placed in the refrigerator in a covered container and observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Based on time and temperature observed, tomato was moved to the freezer and uncovered for rapid cooling at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Scoop handles used for dry ingredients were observed to be in contact with the food. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The following equipment was observed to be in poor repair... - The bathroom sink faucet was observed to be loosely attached to the sink - The Mixer bowl was observed to be dented in several areas - The Mixer paddle was observed to be gauged/worn - The Slicer product grip was observed to be worn and no longer easily cleanable - The Lid to the Milk Cooler was observed to be separating/loose and not connected to the unit. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair and/or replaced when needed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
